headline: PG&E Corp. (PCG) Upgraded by UBS to Buy
summary: PG&E Corp. (NYSE:PCG) is one of the 10 best regulated electric stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On March 9, UBS upgraded PG&E Corp. (NYSE:PCG) from a Neutral rating to Buy. The firm also raised the price target from $20 to $23. The thesis hinges on Phase 2 legislation expected before the July 2 […]
